Spells-Cleric — Male Human Cleric: 10
Strength: 11 (+0) Dexterity: 13 (+1) Constitution: 8 (-1) Intelligence: 12 (+1) Wisdom: 17 (+3) Charisma: 6 (-2)
Background: Soldier Alignment: Neutral Good Deity: Celtic-Briantia (NG)
Ability Boosts: Charisma; Intelligence; Strength; Wisdom Experience: 76864/85000 Level: 10 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 165/330
Ability Notes:
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from any)
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity): Ability Boost (Dexterity)
Ability Boosts: 4 to distribute
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +4
Feat Count: General: 2; Origin: 1 Selectable Feature Count: Cleric (Blessed Strikes); Cleric (Cleric Subclass); Cleric (Divine Order)
Feats: Alert; Boon Of Combat Prowess; Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity) Human Features: Resourceful; Skillful; Versatile Cleric Features: Armor Training (Light; Medium; Shield); Blessed Healer; Blessed Strikes; Channel Divinity; Cleric Subclass; Disciple Of Life; Divine Intervention; Divine Order; Divine Spark; Life Domain Spells; Life Domain; Potent Spellcasting; Preserve Life; Protector; Save Proficiency (Wisdom; Charisma); Sear Undead; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from History, Insight, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion); Spellcasting; Turn Undead; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons) Soldier Features: Ability Boost (Choose 3 from Strength, Dexterity, Constitution); Savage Attacker; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Intimidation); Tool Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Gaming)
Feature Notes:
Blessed Strikes: 1 selection
Cleric Subclass: 1 selection
Divine Order: 1 selection
Versatile: +1 Origin Feat
Resourceful: Gains Heroic Inspiration at the end of a long rest
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; History; Intimidation; Medicine; Religion
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +3 Performance: (cha) -2
Animal Handling: (wis) +3 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) -2
Arcana: (int) +1 Investigation: (int) +1 Religion: (int) +5
Athletics: (str) +4 Medicine: (wis) +7 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) -2 Nature: (int) +1 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +5 Perception: (wis) +3 Survival: (wis) +3
Tool Proficiency: Three-Dragon Ante Set: (wis)
Skill Notes: Skillful: Skill Proficiency (Choose 1 from any)
Combat
Hit Points: 20 Initiative: +5 Armor Class: 12
Armor Training: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: Leather Shield: None Weapons: Flail (+4 1d8 B; Sap); Longbow (+5 1d8+1 P R150/600; Slow); Pistol (+5 1d10+1 P R30/90; Vex); Unarmed (+4 1 B)
Combat Notes:
Alert: +4 Initiative
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: -10
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Protector: Armor Training (Heavy)/Weapon Proficiency (Martial Weapons)
Alert: Can swap initiatives with a willing ally
Boon Of Combat Prowess: Can treat an attack miss as a hit once per turn
Boon Of Irresistible Offense (Dexterity): Bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage ignores resistance, and natural 20 hits inflict +13 damage
Divine Spark: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 2d8 hit points or to inflict 2d8 HP of a choice of necrotic or radiant (save Constitution half)
Savage Attacker: Can use the better of 2 damage rolls once per turn
Sear Undead: Successful Turn Undead also inflicts 3d8 HP radiant
Turn Undead: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to make undead flee (save DC 15 Wisdom negates) for 1 min or until damaged
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: -1; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +1; Strength: +0; Wisdom: +7
Magic
Spell Slots: C0: 5; C1: 4; C2: 3; C3: 3; C4: 3; C5: 2 Attack: C: +7 Spell DC: C: 15
Spells:
Aid (C2 Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 hit points]
Aid (C2 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R30' 3 targets gain +5 current and maximum hit points for 8 hr [+Level gives +5 hit points]
Animate Dead (C3 Necr): R10' Bones or the corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid becomes a skeleton or zombie that obeys commands when within 60' for 24 hr [+Level animates +2 undead]
Antimagic Field (C8 Abju): 10' radius suppresses magic for concentration up to 1 hr
Astral Projection (C9 Necr): R10' Self and 8 willing targets project to the Astral Plane
Augury (C2 Divi): Reveals the weal or woe outcome of a proposed act up to 30 min in the future; additional uses before a long rest impose a cumulative 25% chance of receiving a random response [R]
Aura Of Life (C4 Abju): 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Aura Of Life (C4 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): 30' radius gives allies resistance to necrotic damage and immunity to maximum hit point reduction, and raises those with 0 hit points to 1 hit point, for concentration up to 10 min
Bane (C1 Ench): R30' 3 targets suffer -1d4 on attacks and saves (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Banishment (C4 Abju): R30' Banishes the target to its home plane or to a demiplane (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min; extraplanar creatures don't return if the spell is maintained for a full min [+Level affects +1 target]
Beacon Of Hope (C3 Abju): R30' Targets gain advantage on Wisdom and death saves and regain maximum hit points from healing for concentration up to 1 min
Bestow Curse (C3 Necr): Touched suffers a choice of disadvantage on specified ability rolls, disadvantage on attacks on self, requiring a successful Wisdom save to take any action other than Dodge, or +1d8 HP necrotic from self attacks (save Wisdom negates) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level extends the maximum duration to 10 min, 8 hr, 24 hr, or permanent at level 4, 5, 7, or 9; levels above 4 require no concentration]
Blade Barrier (C6 Evoc): R90' Creates a 100'x20'x5' blade wall or a 60'x20'x5' blade ring that provides 3/4 cover and inflicts 6d10 HP force (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min
Bless (C1 Ench): R30' 3 targets gain +1d4 on attacks and saves for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Bless (C1 [Life Domain Spells] Ench): R30' 3 targets gain +1d4 on attacks and saves for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Blindness/Deafness (C2 Tran): R120' Inflicts a choice of blindness or deafness (save Constitution negates; additional saves each rd end) for 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Calm Emotions (C2 Ench): R60' 20' radius suppresses a choice of charmed and frightened or hostility (save Charisma negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Clairvoyance (C3 Divi): R1 mile Self can choose each rd to see or hear via an invisible sensor for concentration up to 10 min
Command (C1 Ench): R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self (save Wisdom negates) for 1 rd [+Level affects +1 target]
Commune (C5 Divi): Deity answers 3 yes/no questions asked within 1 min; additional uses before a long rest inflict a cumulative 25% chance of failure [R]
Conjure Celestial (C7 Conj): R90' 10' radius either restores 4d12+3 hit points or inflicts 6d12 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) on each target for concentration up to 10 min; can be moved 30' each turn [+Level restores or inflicts +1d12 hit points]
Contagion (C5 Necr): Touch inflicts 11d8 HP necrotic, poisoned, and disadvantage on chosen ability saves (save Constitution negates; subsequent saves each turn either end after three successes or extend to 7 days after 3 failures; other effects that would end poisoned require a successful Constitution save to succeed)
Continual Flame (C2 Evoc): Touched emits a heatless torch flame
Control Water (C4 Tran): R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Weather (C8 Tran): Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius for concentration up to 8 hr
Create Food And Water (C3 Conj): R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Create Or Destroy Water (C1 Tran): R30' Creates or destroys 10 gallons of water or fog in a 30' cube [+Level affects +10 gallons or a +5' cube]
Create Undead (C6 Necr): R10' 3 corpses become ghouls that obey commands within 120' for 24 hr; additional castings extend the duration for 24 hr [+Level creates 4 ghouls; 5 ghouls, 2 ghasts, or 2 wights; or 6 ghouls, 3 ghasts, 3 wights, or 2 mummies at level 7, 8, or 9]
Cure Wounds (C1 Abju): Touched regains 2d8+3 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Cure Wounds (C1 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched regains 2d8+3 hit points [+Level restores +2d8 hit points]
Daylight (C3 Evoc): R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Death Ward (C4 Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Death Ward (C4 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched retains 1 HP when next reduced to 0 HP or survives the next death effect within 8 hrs
Detect Evil And Good (C1 Divi): R30' Reveals aberrations, celestials, elementals, feys, fiends, undead, and Hallow effects for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Detect Magic (C1 Divi): R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Poison And Disease (C1 Divi): R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and magical contagions for concentration up to 10 min; 1' of wood, dirt, or stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Dispel Evil And Good (C5 Abju): Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead suffer disadvantage on attacks vs. self for concentration up to 1 min; ending the spell early allows a successful spell attack on one of these creatures to return it to its home plane (save Charisma negates), or to end with a touch an enchanted, frightened, or possessed condition inflicted by one of them
Dispel Magic (C3 Abju): R120' Ends the effects on the target of spells up to level 3, and successful DC 10 + spell level checks end each higher-level spell [+Level ends any spell of equal or lesser level]
Divination (C4 Divi): Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divine Word (C7 Evoc): R30' Inflicts death on targets with up to 20 HP, blinded, deafened, and stunned for 1 hr on those with up to 30 HP, blinded and deafened for 10 min on those with up to 40 HP, and deafened for 1 min on those with up to 50 HP, and forces celestials, elementals, fey, and fiends to return to their home planes (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr
Earthquake (C8 Tran): R500' 100' radius inflicts difficult terrain, opens fissures, damages structures, knocks prone, and breaks concentration (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Enhance Ability (C2 Tran): Touched gains advantage on chosen ability checks for concentration up to 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Etherealness (C7 Conj): Self enters Ethereal Plane for up to 8 hr [+Level affects +2 or +5 targets at level 8 or 9]
Find The Path (C6 Divi): Reveals the shortest path to a specified familiar destination for concentration up to 1 day
Find Traps (C2 Divi): R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Fire Storm (C7 Evoc): R150' 10 contiguous 10' cubes inflict 7d10 HP fire (save Dexterity half) and ignite unattended flammable objects
Flame Strike (C5 Evoc): R60' 10' radius inflicts 5d6 HP fire and 5d6 HP radiant (save Dexterity half) [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP fire and radiant]
Forbiddance (C6 Abju): Touched 40,000 sq ft bars teleport and portals; entry inflicts 5d10 HP of a choice of radiant or necrotic to one or more choices of aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead (password negates) for 1 day; casting daily for 30 days makes the effects permanent [R]
Freedom Of Movement (C4 Abju): Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and a 30' swim Speed and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr [+Level affects +1 target]
Gate (C9 Conj): R60' Opens a circular portal to another plane for concentration up to 1 min; can be used to bring a creature from another plane
Geas (C5 Ench): R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic each day (save Wisdom negates) for 30 days [+Level extends the duration to 365 days or permanently at level 7 or 9]
Gentle Repose (C2 Necr): Touched corpse becomes immune to decay and animation for 10 days [R]
Glyph Of Warding (C3 Abju): When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1]
Greater Restoration (C5 Abju): Touched recovers from an effect causing an exhaustion level, a charmed or petrified condition, a curse, an ability reduction, or a reduction of hit point maximum
Guardian Of Faith (C4 Conj): R30' 10' radius inflicts 20 HP radiant on foes (save Dexterity half) for 8 hr or until 60 HP inflicted
Guidance (C0 Divi): Touched gains +1d4 on a choice of skill for concentration up to 1 min
Guiding Bolt (C1 Evoc): R120' Ranged spell inflicts 4d6 HP radiant and gives advantage on the next attack on the target before the end of the next turn [+Level inflicts +1d6 HP]
Hallow (C5 Evoc): 60' radius becomes warded against aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and their effects and evokes a boon or bane effect
Harm (C6 Necr): R60' Inflicts 14d6 HP necrotic and an equal maximum hit point reduction (save Constitution half HP only)
Heal (C6 Abju): R60' Target regains 70 hit points and recovers from blinded, deafened, and poisoned [+Level restores +10 hit points]
Healing Word (C1 Abju): R60' Target regains 2d4+3 hit points [+Level restores +2d4 hit points]
Heroes' Feast (C6 Conj): 12 diners who consume a 1-hr meal gain resistance to poison, immunity to becoming poisoned and frightened, and +2d10 hit points and maximum hit points for 24 hr
Hold Person (C2 Ench): R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min [+Level affects +1 target]
Holy Aura (C8 Abju): Targets in a 30' radius gain advantage on saves, inflict disadvantage on attackers, and blind successful fiend and undead melee attackers (save Constitution negates) until the end of its next turn for concentration up to 1 min
Inflict Wounds (C1 Necr): Touch inflicts 2d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half) [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Insect Plague (C5 Conj): R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d10 HP]
Legend Lore (C5 Divi): Reveals info about a specified famous person, place, or object
Lesser Restoration (C2 Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Lesser Restoration (C2 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): Touched recovers from a choice of blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned
Light (C0 Evoc): Touched unattended object emits a 20' bright light for 1 hr
Locate Creature (C4 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; lead blocks the spell
Locate Object (C2 Divi): Reveals the location of a specified object or type within 1000' for concentration up to 10 min; lead blocks the spell
Magic Circle (C3 Abju): R10' 10' radius prevents a choice of physical entry or exit (save Charisma allows magical transit), inflicts disadvantage on attacks, and negates charm, fright, and possession by one or more choices of celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead, for 1 hr [+Level extends the duration +1 hr]
Mass Cure Wounds (C5 Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+3 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Cure Wounds (C5 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 5d8+3 HP [+Level restores +1d8 HP]
Mass Heal (C9 Abju): R60' Targets regain 700 HP total and recover from blinded, deafened, and poisoned
Mass Healing Word (C3 Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+3 HP [+Level restores +1d4 HP]
Mass Healing Word (C3 [Life Domain Spells] Abju): R60' 6 targets regain 2d4+3 HP [+Level restores +1d4 HP]
Meld Into Stone (C3 Tran): Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP force, expulsion, and prone to self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Mending (C0 Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Planar Ally (C6 Conj): R60' Summons a servant of an otherworldly entity to bargain for aid
Planar Binding (C5 Abju): R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr [+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9]
Plane Shift (C7 Conj): Self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Power Word Heal (C9 Ench): R60' Target regains all hit points, recovers from charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned, and can use a reaction to stand from prone
Prayer Of Healing (C2 Evoc): R30' 5 targets gain the benefits of a short rest and regain 2d8 hit points after 10 min of casting; additional castings have no effect on a target until it completes a long rest [+Level restores +1d8 hit points]
Protection From Energy (C3 Abju): Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Protection From Evil And Good (C1 Abju): Willing touched gains immunity to charmed, frightened, and possession from aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead and advantage on saves vs. existing conditions for concentration up to 10 min; those creatures also suffer disadvantage on attacks on the target
Protection From Poison (C2 Abju): Touched recovers from the poisoned condition and gains advantage on saves vs. being poisoned and resistance to poison for 1 hr
Purify Food And Drink (C1 Tran): R10' Removes poison and disease from nonmagical food and drink in a 5' radius [R]
Raise Dead (C5 Necr): Restores life with 1 hit point to and removes poisons from a willing touched 10-day-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest
Regenerate (C7 Tran): Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and regrows severed parts after 2 min
Remove Curse (C3 Abju): Frees a touched creature from all curses or breaks the attunement to a touched cursed object
Resistance (C0 Abju): Touched reduces by 1d4 HP any damage taken from a choice of acid, bludgeoning, cold, fire, lightning, necrotic, piercing, poison, radiant, slashing, or thunder for concentration up to 1 min
Resurrection (C7 Necr): Restores life with full hit points to and removes poisons, wounds, and maims from a willing touched 100-year-old corpse; target suffers -4 attacks, saves, and ability checks, reduced by 1 for each long rest; use on a corpse dead 365 days or more inflicts on self loss of spellcasting and disadvantage on attacks, ability checks, and saves until the next long rest
Revivify (C3 Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Revivify (C3 [Life Domain Spells] Necr): Restores life and 1 hit point to a touched 1-minute-old corpse
Sacred Flame (C0 Evoc): R60' Inflicts 2d8 HP radiant (save Dexterity negates), ignoring 1/2 and 3/4 cover
Sanctuary (C1 Abju): R30' Foes of the target cannot attack it (save Wisdom negates) for 1 min; target attacking, inflicting damage, or casting ends
Scrying (C5 Divi): Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Sending (C3 Evoc): Self can exchange a pair of 25-word messages with a familiar target
Shield Of Faith (C1 Abju): R60' Target gains +2 Armor Class for concentration up to 10 min
Silence (C2 Illu): R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Spare The Dying (C0 Necr): R30' Target dying creature becomes stable
Speak With Dead (C3 Necr): R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Spirit Guardians (C3 Conj): 15' radius inflicts 3d8 HP necrotic or radiant (save Wisdom half) and half Speed on non-designated creatures for concentration up to 10 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Spiritual Weapon (C2 Evoc): R60' Creates a spectral weapon that inflicts 1d8+3 HP force and can move 20' and attack as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min [+Level inflicts +1d8 HP]
Stone Shape (C4 Tran): Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Sunbeam (C6 Evoc): 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd for concentration up to 1 min
Sunburst (C8 Evoc): R150' 60' radius inflicts 12d6 HP radiant and blindness for 1 min (save Constitution half HP only; an additional save each turn ends blindness)
Symbol (C7 Abju): Inscribes a touched object with a permanent glyph that, when triggered, inflicts a choice of harmful magic effect: 10d10 HP necrotic (save Constitution half); arguing for 1 min that inflicts disadvantage on attacks and ability checks (save Wisdom negates); frightened and fleeing for 1 min (save Wisdom negates); incapacitated by pain for 1 min (save Constitution negates); asleep for 10 min or until shaken or harmed (save Wisdom negates); stunned for 1 min (save Wisdom negates)
Thaumaturgy (C0 Tran): R30' Creates a minor magic effect: a booming voice for 1 min; a modification of flames for 1 min; harmless ground tremors for 1 min; an illusory sound; movement of a door or window; a change in eye appearance for 1 min
Tongues (C3 Divi): Touched understands any language and is universally understood for 1 hr
True Resurrection (C9 Necr): Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
True Seeing (C6 Divi): Touched gains 120' truesight for 1 hr
Warding Bond (C2 Abju): Willing touched gains +1 Armor Class, +1 saves, and resistance to all damage, and any damage to the target also affects self, for 1 hr or until separated from self by more than 60'
Water Walk (C3 Tran): R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Word Of Recall (C6 Conj): R5' Teleports self and 5 others to a prepared location
Zone Of Truth (C2 Ench): R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Blessed Healer: Using a spell slot to cast a healing spell restores 2 + spell level hit points to self
Channel Divinity: Can use a Channel Divinity effect 3 times per long rest; regains 1 use after a short rest
Disciple Of Life: Using a spell slot to cast a healing spell restores an additional 2 + spell level hit points
Divine Intervention: Can cast a level 5 Cleric spell without using a spell slot or material components once per long rest
Potent Spellcasting: Cleric cantrips inflict +3 HP
Preserve Life: R30' Can use Channel Divinity to restore 50 hit points among targets, raising each to up to half its maximum hit points
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the cleric spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual
